data.title: MicroBit Bitcoin and Ethereum ETFs Debut on Hong Kong Exchange
data.description:
According to PANews, MicroBit Bitcoin Spot ETF (HKD code: 3430.HK; USD code: 9430.HK) and MicroBit Ethereum Spot ETF (HKD code: 3425.HK; USD code: 9425.HK) were officially listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange on August 21, 2025. The combined initial asset size of these two ETFs reached $220 million, highlighting the strong market interest in virtual assets and investor confidence in Xiaofei Asset Management.

Bitcoin, the largest cryptocurrency by market capitalization, has shown robust performance this year, with the MicroBit Bitcoin Spot ETF's initial asset size surpassing $200 million. Meanwhile, Ethereum has recently become a focal point in the market, with the MicroBit Ethereum Spot ETF's initial subscription amount reaching $20 million. These ETFs offer investors a compliant and transparent channel for direct investment in the two major cryptocurrencies, Bitcoin and Ethereum.

Previously, it was reported that Xiaofei Asset Management launched the Bitcoin Spot ETF and Ethereum Spot ETF.

data.title: PA Lawmaker Proposes HB1812 to Ban Officials from Trading Crypto — SHIB Alert
data.description:
Summary: What is HB1812 and what does it do? HB1812 is a bill introduced by Pennsylvania State Representative Ben Waxman to prevent elected officials and their families from profiting from cryptocurrency while in office. It bars transactions over $1,000 and requires divestment of existing crypto within 90 days. The legislation reflects broader efforts to increase transparency and oversight in the crypto market. Pennsylvania State Representative Ben Waxman has introduced legislation seeking to prohibit elected officials and their families from earning profits through cryptocurrency holdings while serving in public office
source: https://news.shib.io/2025/08/22/pa-lawmaker-proposes-hb1812-to-ban-officials-from-trading-crypto-shib-alert/

data.title: K-Drama Star Faces 3-Year Jail for Using Company Funds to Buy Crypto
data.description:
Summary: Why is K-Drama star Hwang Jung-eum facing jail time in South Korea? Hwang is accused of using 4. 3 billion won ($3. 3M) from her entertainment agency to buy cryptocurrency in 2022. She transferred part of the funds to her personal account and used the rest for taxes
source: https://news.shib.io/2025/08/22/k-drama-star-faces-3-year-jail-for-using-company-funds-to-buy-crypto/

data.title: Ripple’s RLUSD stablecoin to enter Japanese market by 2026
data.description:
Crypto firm Ripple has revealed plans to expand its RLUSD stablecoin into Japan by 2026. On Aug. 22, the stablecoin issuer announced that it had signed a memorandum of understanding with SBI VC Trade, a Japanese financial powerhouse SBI Holdings subsidiary
source: https://cryptoslate.com/ripples-rlusd-stablecoin-to-enter-japanese-market-by-2026/

data.title: Whale Sells Ethereum for Significant Profit in August
data.description:
According to TechFlow, on August 22, a large Ethereum holder, identified by the address starting with 0x7C10, sold 2,217 ETH, valued at approximately $9. 5 million. This transaction was monitored by the on-chain analysis platform Lookonchain. The Ethereum was originally purchased three months ago at a lower price, resulting in a profit of $4 million from this sale.
source: https://www.binance.com/en/square/post/28652349496146?utm_source=BinanceNewsRSS

data.title: Taiwan prosecutors charge 14 suspects in $41 million BitShine crypto fraud: reports
